fix: Viewer header sprint switcher over probed sprint files (newest first, active default); closed sprints render lanes + decisions + retrospective notes + step_log verdicts; selection round-trips through the History API (?sprint=N deep-link). No server change; read-only. Commit bc8e892. code-standards PASS.
title: Viewer sprint switcher: past sprints readable from the status page
description: The viewer gains a sprint switcher over the sprint files it already probes: the active sprint renders by default; selecting a closed sprint renders the same lanes plus its decisions, retrospective notes, and step_log gate verdicts. End-to-end: sprints 1 through 6 browsable on the live status page.
acceptance_criteria: Switcher lists every probed sprint, newest first, active sprint default
A closed sprint shows lanes, decisions, retrospective notes, and step_log verdicts
No server change; viewer stays read-only over .excn JSON
Src-First: template viewer first, dogfood root mirrors; code-standards gate PASSes; verified on the live viewer server
